name: vezeor-customer-android
description: Capacitor Android wrapper for the VEZEOR customer PWA. Loads order.vezeor.cloud in a native shell with vibration/audio/camera access. Env-driven — see env/ for per-environment config.

scripts.build:staging:debug: APP_ENV=staging npm run android:sync && APP_ENV=staging npm run android:build:debug
scripts.build:staging:release: APP_ENV=staging npm run android:sync && APP_ENV=staging npm run android:build:release
